What a wonderful stay! A lovely place to take your family. We stayed in the Tram and its so comfortable. Amenities GALORE, jumped in the hot tub while it was blowing a wintry gale and it was awesome!

Everything is 10/10. Wonderfully warm welcome, supremely clean rooms and gardens and roads paths and sites. Kangaroos came up for a quick chat to see how we were doing the bird life is amazing.

Modern, clean, tidy and the beds are super comfy. I felt refreshed on leaving. Can't wait to back next year.

It's our first time to check in at a Big 4 site - the one in Healesville. We got the cabin with disabled access. It was spacious, clean, and had all the amenities that you could need... Ref, dishwasher, washing machine. The toilet door was wide and can easily fit a wheel chair. The linens were fresh and clean. Overall, two thumbs up.

Amazing caravan park with endless things to do. Ive been coming here since i was a child.
If you're into wildlife I strongly recommend a lakeside cabin (the log wood ones are the OG cabins). You'll get all kinds of birds on your balcony in the morning, possums your balcony at night so bring a few apples, and roos everywhere at dawn and dusk.

Update. The staff are amazing and Marina is a saint.
Highly recommended! Good location and the room is well equipped.
It's just unbelievable!!! the staff was amazing.
Good place for vacation.

Stayed there 3 or 4 times in the pasted, but we’ve stayed there over the weekend, the staff were fantastic, couldn’t do enough for us. The new upgraded facilities are second to none, the camp kitch is the best camp kitchen I’ve seen to date. Everything was spotless and I can’t wait to see the rest of the new upgrades. The location is beautiful. Definitely will be coming back.

Great park especially with kids. Perfect location for day trips to local wineries etc.
We will return
First time staying at a Big4 park and we were blown away. Beautiful and clean camp sites, amazing camp kitchen and shower facilities. Looking forward to coming back and checking out the cabins
Stay was amazing. Facilities are great, birds and creek are beautiful. If you're a fungi lover then keep an eye out for some sneaky subaeruginosas in the gumtree leaf litter 🍄🍂❤️
Great park fantastic facilities and great staff
We came late but Mike the manager waited for us at the entrance!!😁The toilet was very clean the water was very warm.
Absolutely spotless park with fantastic amenities. Up there with the best. The camp kitchen was amazing and very large. Not a thing had bern forgotten, huge TV, games tables. Communal areas galore.
We stayed in the tram, its was a wonderful experience.
Beautiful spot.We had a group of 8, cabin and campsite,  couldn't have been happier with the hospitality and facilities - lovely and quiet mid-week as well!

This Big 4 caravan park is absolutely amazing, large sites with a concrete slab, grassy surrounding area. We were upgraded to a site with an ensuite which was stocked with towels etc and top quality body wash, shampoo and conditioner, very roomy and clean.  Lights stayed on during the night which was very helpful. The camp kitchen was well equipped with an airfryer, blender, coffee machine, 3 full size ovens and hot plates, large refrigerator, dishwashers, cleaning products also a huge TV with gas heaters, fireplace and a comfy lounge. There is plenty of space for many people in the area. Also table tennis was in good use in the under cover area.
The amenities block was also well stocked and very clean.
It was a bit cool but this didn’t stop families from using the heated pool, two tennis courts provided plenty of fun also and well equipped playgrounds spread throughout the park.
Friendly staff topped off our stay.
Friendly staff. Good facilities.

Very good experience for me and my first time family other than that alot of rude people around it had never hit 5pm and was already getting told too keep it down from the other stayers mind you my 17 month old is gonna be loud and excited which she was! Had other kids up later than that being loud didn't mind it cause it's a weekend for the families especially for the kids
Great holiday park with entertaining facilities for the kids. Badger creek running through the property is a great feature for exploring as well as the local bird life able to be hand fed.
Had a great stay, facility's were fantastic

We absolutely love this park. Fantastic facilities, amazing service. We camped and got thoroughly flooded on put first night. Dedicated to book a cabin for our second night and they gave us a deluxe room opposite our campsite so we wouldn't have far to move our stuff. Had it cleaned so we could move in early and charges us for a standard cabin.

Have been here many times ans will be back many more. Can't recommend it highly enough

Overcrowded camp ground with really poor facilities. Could have been a nice camp ground since its in a great area with a really nice creek running through it, however the owners have crammed more sites on than the area can handle or at least more than the facilities can, meaning that at the front of the park campers are tightly packed, and the facilities available cannot handle a busy weekend, camp kitchen is poorly built with tiny sinks causing huge waiting times, adequate bathroom facilities are lacking, so the owners have stacked revolting porta-loos, renovation on the one toilet block poorly done so floors are lifting, drainage is bad and hot water runs out. Bush area at the back all cleared for more camping with porta-loos for facilities. Have stayed in some great Big4s -  I wouldn't recommend this one.

意外的很不错，小鸟很多，地方开阔，树木高耸。有很多小孩子可以玩的设施，下次来墨尔本就住这里了。

缺点是泳池好小，而且当天水质问题，应该是缺乏维护。ENSUITE很老，但是他们有新建新的地块，不知道下次可不可以去体验。有老式火车车厢改的小屋应该还不错，看起来很有意思，推荐大家去试试。

Absolutely stoked with our 3 night stay! The camp kitchen was AMAZING! Very well stocked (airfryer, blender, dish clothes), plenty of space for many people to use. Huge TV and fireplace with a comfy lounge! Loved this luxury being full-time on the road.
We had an ensuite site, the ensuite was beautiful and extremely clean, fresh towels and face washers waiting. The best part was having GOOD QUALITY body wash, shampoo, and conditioner. They are in the shared toilets as well.
The Rosella's are very friendly and gentle, we got seed from reception and fed them each day.
Was fantastic having a heated pool on the cooler days (2 pools to choose from).
Finally, all staff were very friendly and accommodating. Thank you guys for having us!

I had a very disappointing experience there while I was camping in un-powered area.
Couple of dried tree branches fall on my car and damaged it. It was exact place that kids were playing couple of hours before the incident and few meters from where my tent was.
After few days, I am still shocked .....

Update: Owners didn't accept that this is happening because their maintenance is not efficient . Given that similar matter has happened there before, I am questioning efficiency of their safety policies. So I would seek professional authorities' ideas about this matter. Yes this time car insurance is covering but if it was happening to a person, money could not compensate anything.
The view and service are great! But there is no restaurant are in walking distance, if u want to have drink, u better get some takeaway food first. Overall I had a great experience!

Should be 5 stars as facilities are very good but..............the camp kitchen was sub let to a corporate crowd of around 30 people for team building for all the 3 days we were there, restricting our access to it day and night. In the afternoon the corporate guests ferried alcohol and food in to have a big party.  After the first night we alerted the camp as music blared till 11.30pm. We told the office staff they were preparing another party the next day as we had watched them carrying beers, wines and food into the camp kitchen again. No action was taken and they partied noisily till 1.30am before the last 3 cars raced off through the camp. Complained again the next day on our way out but nobody seemed to care. 🤷‍♂️ Would avoid this camp if you like peace, quiet and sleep!! 😴

At $100 for a powered site expect excellence but disappointed. Site was filthy with cigarette butts plastic. We filled aplastic bag with garbage. The drain overflowed as it was blocked. The buy one get one free coffe took 45 mins because our order was lost. Would not recommend and won't be going back

I just wanted to say what amazing customer service Park Lane Yarra Valley have provided, they were extremely accommodating and sympathetic of the situation.
We will definitely be booking again.
Fantastic park! Michael and the team were so welcoming. Huge variety of accommodation and site options, great facilities and great location only an hour from Melbourne. Heaps of wildlife too! 🤩

Great place to escape the city crowd to the natural environment. Very close to Melbourne. Lots of activities for kids such as bike and scooter ramp, tennis, table tennis, game room, jumping pillow, hot swimming pool and play area. Impressive location of the park accommodation with views to creek and lake. It was great to hang out with family and friends to enjoy community campfire and outdoor barbecue. The kitchen, toilet, and showers were regularly cleaned. Lots of options for accommodation tent, caravan, pods, cabins, etc

Had a glamping pod (without an ensuite) for 1 night and unfortunately we wernt told that we needed a code to use the bathrooms. We didnt even consider it until 3am in the morning when one of us needed the bathroom and we couldnt get in. Had to walk around the camp sites looking for other toilets we could use which is unsafe when its dark.
When I rang in the morning to let the staff know what had happened and how dissapointing it was, I was essentially told by the receptionist that ALL of the staff are really good with letting customers know where to find the codes and it was unlikely that we wernt told. I wouldnt have had to walk around in the dark to find another toilet if we had been told! Dissapointing response from staff.

Better than lovely.  We had a gorgeous cabin by the creek that was peaceful. Unexpectedly, our cabin had a dishwasher and a washing machine. Exceptionally clean and convenient. We especially enjoyed the numerous cockatoos who joined us for breakfast!

The location of the venue is nice, the layout is nice, but there are no rules for those who make noise at 01:00 at night.  It is a place open to public use and everyone pays the fee. They do not want to be disturbed or lose sleep.  I wonder if it's the same in the other Big4?
Great park. Super close to Melbourne but far enough away to feel like a getaway
Well layed out park in a beautiful setting.
Highly recommended this place, staffs was so friendly, they even post the lost items to my address huge thanks for your best service
Awesome definetly going again

This was our first trip to the Big 4 Yarra Valley Park Lane. It was sensational! A beautiful cabin on the river, amazing facilities, staff were friendly and welcoming. From feeding the birds, to swimming in creek and pools, to the playground and pump track it was the perfect family holiday. Kids LOVED the onsite food truck as well. Our only negative is that we couldn’t stay longer. Booking in for two weeks next time. Thanks guys!!

Food van located inside of park right next to campers not good! The noise from the generators is loud and very intrusive. Cannot sit anywhere near the site given excessive noise. Should position the food vans in an area not co located with campers.and too many people hanging around camp site waiting for food. Never seen this before and won’t be coming back

Two time we have been there and we like the place.
Very nice, pretty place In a pretty town Healsville 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
Expensive buts lots to do
Awesome place . The park is very big and loved the space in the tent area, rest room and kitchen. The kitchen and barbecue area is very spacious. Lot of things for kids to play and roam around.

Beautiful park. Great job on keeping it looking great.
We were there over New Years and there were a lot of small children leaving there wheels on the road way. I realize it's New Years but very loud, heavy base Hip Hop or rap music shouldn't be permitted. We paid for our space not to be interrupted by what we considered as very excessive noise.

Hands down the best place to spend with the family surrounded by families, we spent NYE in the park and we where amazed and so overwhelmed by the friendliness of staff and other attendants at the park.
Staff the next day where going around wishing a happy new year and attendees also saying happy new year as if we had known each other for a long time.
Parents where at ease letting their kids play on their bikes or scooters knowing that anyone that came in with their cars are driving extremely slow, if a child went missing it became EVERYONE'S child (the child was found taking a break in the shade of riding his bike), we will be definetly back and we already can't wait !!
So thank you to all staff and the other families their on NYE and following day, you all have made our NYE the most amazing time 💜

Great location with good amenities, but think they need to think about more as the park increases in size. Also, whilst staff are great and friendly, think they need to be more active in informing people of the does and don't.
Glamping.... not good choice in Rain.. very shame..
Fantastic location and best service 👏 👌

Very high quality facilities and spacious.

Not really in a great walking location, but in all other aspects a high quality, family friendly and well maintained park.
What a fantastic place

Outstanding! No other word can come to my mind.
My pictures can tell my love to this place. Highly recommended. Kids got their best vacation at the start of their holidays. They enjoyed heated pool. Feeding birds. Eating Watermelon and mangoes while sitting in the creek, sleeping in camps or in cabin. Walking from one playground to other.
You want luxury or you wanna go un powered, all is here. Aah and my hubby got his favourite Avocado slice in the brky.

A big thank you to the kind and compassionate staff.
I made an error when I booked and I booked in for the wrong date. The staff were extremely kind and comforting when I rang and were able to help fix the issue,  despite being fully booked.
Wonderful caravan park.  Lots to do for kids and quiet for adults.

Unbelievable facilities & setup. We only stayed for a weekend on a standard powered site- of which there was plenty of room for our camper, 4WD & grassed sitting room, but enjoyed our time so much. The toilet blocks nearest us were great, including a fully setup family room which made it so easy to wrangle our toddler. The decked out common rooms, pump track, swimming pools, jump pads and playgrounds were also all a big hit, so much to do! We will be back for sure, hopefully for a longer stay next time. Thankyou for having us.

Very friendly and welcoming staff. Excellent range of facilities for the kids whether it is sunshine or solid rain. Heated pool was a hit while it rained on adult supervision.
Serious coffee machine in the kiosk got a workout and was a welcome start to the day. Some camping sites I saw were a bit gravelly but that’s literally all I could fault it the entire place and to note our sites were actually luscious grass.
Loved camping by the creek!
Excellent child friendly park
Super gepflegter Campground, riesen Campkitchen mit allem was das Herz begehrt, tolle sanitäre Anlage, bin begeistert. Wir waren vor 11 Jahren schon einmal dort und es ist noch besser geworden
Camped in the new section on the middle terrace. Not really practical to walk to local attractions. Great camp kitchen. Dump point was a long way from the new section.
We stayed in our caravan. But the grounds are beautiful and bird life amazing.

What a magnificent place to relax & unwind.Our powered site easily accommodated our motor home and car and also provided plenty of shade on a hot day.No expense has been spared on the recently added area where the amenities and settings are both first class but also in keeping with nature.
Michael (aka Kiss fan) was so friendly and helpful when we needed some assistance- would highly recommend and definitely comeback again.

We had a wonderful stay over the Melbourne Cup long weekend. Our powered site was one of the largest we’ve ever stayed on, with ample room to set up our caravan, gazebo and plenty of room for the kids the play. The facilities were beautiful and so well looked after. It was almost as if we weren’t camping! The staff were beyond helpful. We had the best time and will be back for sure!

Kind friendly and helpful reception staff but a very noisy crowded and cramped park with big lights on all night making it difficult to sleep. We had booked two nights but left early after just one night. And no refund offered.

Rundum ein super Campingplatz, freundliches Personal, sehr saubere und moderne Sanitäreinrichtungen, viele Möglichkeiten für Kinder und Jugendliche sich zu betätigen und klasse BBQ-Areas. Weiterhin gibt es auf dem Campingplatz unzählige Tiere wie Papageien, Enten oder Possums.
It's a fantastic park with a great range of accommodation. The facilities around the park are really 👌The many different kitchens and play areas are fantastic and well equipped
Eru good place to do camping with family and kids

Fabulous park, the new section is great. Amenities have rain shower heads, sites are large grassy sites with concrete slabs to park the van on. The camp kitchen is unlike any I’ve seen, great for big group get togethers. The creek running through the park is so pretty & the bird life are very tame. Highly recommend.

Wow! Sensational overnight stay in a stylishly refurbished tram! Just imagine - 3 bathrooms, 3 bedrooms, lounge and superb kitchen as well as deck with outdoor setting overlooking the Park. This Holiday Park is amazing with all its various styles of accommodation including glamping pods with ensuites and luxe cabins. By far my fave was the tram stay! I could not fault the provisions, the aircon and heating, the layout and attention to detail to remind people they are actually staying in a heritage tram. On arrival the staff were friendly and went out of their way to explain the holiday park's amenities. This is a real nature oasis with 65 acres of bushland, colourful birds and superb trees and flora. I am sure there was lots of wildlife but it was cold and wet when I stayed so I just tucked up in full comfort in the tram and marvelled at how they fitted everything in so nicely. I am definitely coming back with my grandchildren one day soon as I know they will love it and Healesville Sanctuary is just down the road. Bonus!
Beautiful spot - grab a powered site 97-107 alongside a flowing Picaninny creek for a relaxing backyard . Lovely staff. Great neat clean facilities.
Everything was amazing except it is not accessable by public transport
Fabulous location and park. The staff are friendly and couldn't be more accommodating.  Michael was just a delight.

I highly recommend this camping site. A wide variety of facilities, playground, outdoor pool, barbies, public toilets, some shops and bar, small lake and green bushes, etc. And a wide range of accommodations for different groups and families.
Nice campsite

Absolutely beautiful caravan park. Excellent, modern and well maintained facilities. We had a powered camping site and it was fantastic. Pool was great, the kids had plenty to do. We will definitely be back!

Fabulous week away !!! ITS A MUST VISIT !!!Highly Recommend visiting this park, powered sites in the newly established area were amazing with plenty of room the views spectaculator looking over the forest and running creek so peaceful with plenty of wildlife to see. Newly modern camp kitchen was well thought out.
Staff friendly and extremely helpful. Having food trucks was ideal and different when you can't be bothered cooking on Grand Final Day reminders were sent to our phones. Had an absolute enjoyable time will definitely be back. Thanks Again !!!

Big 4 downplays it's 3 star stay at Healesville. The site is very accommodating and extremely family/kid friendly. There is so much to do for the kids and accomodation comes in so many alternatives. The ensuits, bathrooms, site facilities, games room, BBQ rooms etc. Considering make this a yearly occasion.

An absolutely fantastic place to stay at.
Great facilities and top notch playgrounds for kids.
Awesome activities for kids during the school holidays too
Cute cabin 72. Great mattress &  pillow. Left note for a few suggestions e.g. hooks & narrow shelving placed around the cute cabin. 😀
This is our go-to place for spring and autumn!
Nice out of the way caravan park for the family to enjoy. Caravans, glancing and units available to suit your needs.
Glamping pod was really pleasant and warm. Great facilities and friendly staff!

The best!
We did not want to go home
Beautiful cabins situated within a stunning forest area with a little river running through 💙
Plenty to see and do especially with kids!
The staff were fantastic
Honestly can't wait to come back!
Thanks for having us Aaron, Nicole, Ava and Eli 🤸‍♂️
Great getaway; quiet location; friendly informative staff. Pods were warm, clean and comfortable. Highly recommended!

Had a nice relaxing stay and absolutely loved the glam pod. Went with the ensuite and was so warm and cosy I didn't want to leave.

The park itself is really big and has a lot of variety. Can't recommend enough.
Great comfy night in the glamping pod. Friendly staff on welcome and checkout and only five mins out of Healesville main. 👌🏻
What a gr8 park, spotless and friendly, love the bird life too

Had a twin room cabin, heating on when we arrived so good , beds were very comfortable , no coat hooks in bathroom , hot water HARD to regulate, sent owners message of this, too many text messages from park , camp kitchen area great

We had such a wonderful stay this weekend! 5min drive into town, facilities are great. Highly recommend!
We will be back
Room clean. Mold on one of the quilt. Wi-Fi not accessible. Overall worth the price.
Amazing customer service. Thank you so much!

We had the most fantastic time at the BIG4 in Badger Creek. Michael and his whole crew really made our stay enjoyable. We actually went as a corporate getaway and all stayed in the pods by the river. We also got the fire going at night and had the music going. It was such a great trip and such a wonderful experience. We will all be back
Excellent location for our work event

Sorry to say, but for the premium we paid for the glamping tents (200$+ per night) is not worth it.
I am currently inside it (July month, peak winter), and it feels like I am in a freezer right now. They only just have electric bed-sheets to protect you from the cold and unfortunately they don't even cover the  whole bed. Result, it's freezing. An heater inside the tent was least expected. Big no for small kids.
Also, no dedicated washrooms for glamping tents. Shared between a lot of tents. So, dont expect that to be clean.
Not impressed.

Updating based on the owner comments/reply -
If we were supposed to go camping/glamping by our own, we should not had booked for your tents first of all. We had a small baby (less then 2 yrs) with us and we thought based on your description it will be a relaxing experience and good break for us.
1. It was not.
2. The heating system of the tent was inefficient. Just a heated bedsheet was provided which were not proper as it was not heating up a good 1 feet near the edges of the bed. So, it was very uncomfortable to sleep, especially near the head area. And do you expect everyone just to sit on the bed all the time, that's why you are not providing anything else in the room? You can update your page asking guests to get all the camping stuffs and sleeping bags in that case.
3. The tents were mouldy. And visibly mouldy. Not sure when it was last cleaned.
4. The so called (publicly accessible) private ensuites were just cleaned once a day. The logs are there in the washrooms for everyone to see as a proof. Even that is not done properly. Imagine multiple families using that, and it only gets cleaned once a day during the morning time. Is that the hygiene standard you provide in a private business??
5. Our tent was unfortunately beside the makeshift toilets and the drainage was not proper for that, as you can notice water (or whatever) leakage coming to the area where people are supposed to walk. So, the whole area was utterly unhygienic.
6. Yes, because I paid 200$+ per night for this, least i expected was the place to be comfortable. When it was too cold, and as simple as a room heater not provided, I raised that. Seeing your reply seems like you need some more training in your customer interaction field and to learn how to take customer feedback positively. And ooh la laa!! to you too, hospitalibility business is not for everyone. Unfortunately that is not ok.

WOW! What a beautiful place to stay. Such brilliant service. I had booked glamping tents for the Friday evening,  unfortunately circumstances changed and I could not make it there until Saturday. Not only did they honour my original booking they upgraded us to a 2 bdr cabin for the Saturday evening. I was so grateful.
When we arrived,  check in was so easy,  friendly service.
The cabin was ideally located on Badger Creek,  the running water was so tranquil.
The cabin itself was spacious,  very clean,  equipped with everything you need,  warm, beds were SO comfortable,  shower was hot..
We went for a walk around the park,  such a fabulous atmosphere,  children playing,  parents laughing and chatting in the large shared areas.  There were firepits raging around the area. Grounds were immaculate. I wish I could have stayed for a week! I'm visiting from Perth WA and this stay was certainly a highlight for me.
Thankyou to staff and Management.  Definitely highly recommended 👌 and hopefully I'll get the chance to return one day to experience this little piece of paradise again.
Lovely family park.

Good place to come and enjoy your holiday while in Healesville. The park is 5 mins drive from the town centre and Healesville Sanctuary. You may want to bring your caravan or tent. There's plenty of cabbins or even a tram. Very peaceful with plenty of things to do. The amenities were spotless, and the staff were very friendly and helpful.
Had own rv but easy parking
great place, beautiful setting

My stay at Big 4 Yarra Valley was extremely pleasant. The location is absolutely divine, you will experience nature at its finest and may be visited by local wildlife. We were lucky enough to see the kookaburras and Rosellas on our last day. This park is a great place to stay if you want to get away from the city but also have everything you need at your door-step. The staff are friendly and the accommodation was pristine. Everything about this place was special and I especially recommend it for families with children.
Great stay!
New area very modern, clean and well maintained. Outdoor kitchen and facilities top level.

Amazing place for camping or caravanning. Our group (over 30 of us) didn’t use the cabins, but j hear they are also good. The camp kitchen is first class. We didn’t need to bring half the stuff we did. They have toast LTD makers, ovens bbq’s dishwashers all cutlery etc. heaps of things for the kids to do. Make sure you pack their bikes!
Good stay thanks for hosting us 🙏😁
Sensational place for a break from the city
